description_long: This object features a large, circular stone platform with a marbled gray surface and beveled edges. Around the perimeter, six evenly spaced, arched holders each support a stylized red flame, suggesting the presence of candles or torches. At the center, a prominent golden ornamental structure rises, shaped with pointed, flame-like motifs and intricate cutouts, giving it a ceremonial or mystical appearance. The flames are vivid and stylized, with no visible wicks, and the holders appear to be made of a metallic or stone material. The overall design is symmetrical and imposing, evoking a ritualistic or decorative function suitable for public urban spaces. The platform is broad and flat, capable of supporting additional objects or foot traffic.
description: A large, circular stone platform with six arched holders supporting stylized red flames and a central golden ornamental structure. The design is ceremonial and decorative, with a marbled surface and flame motifs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central golden ornament and all six arched flame holders clearly, with the platform's marbled texture visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the central ornament and the alignment of the flame holders around the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the golden ornament from behind and the symmetrical arrangement of the flames.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the narrowness of the central ornament and the circular layout of the flame holders.
attribute_holder_type: arched stone or metal holders on a stone platform
attribute_placement_location: public plaza or ceremonial outdoor space
